query:
SELECT 
  'book_profiles' as tbl,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_s3
FROM book_profiles;
